title: Extended Armor
body:
# Extended Armor
Simply combine wool and an armor piece to dye it (in the crafting table). Then continue to combine the armor piece and more dye until you are satisfied with the resulting color.  
You can of course upgrade the new colored diamond armor pieces to netherite.  

[![discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY](https://i.imgur.com/1FFOXRB.png)](https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY)  

[https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY](https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY "https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY")

## Supported Armor Pieces
- Golden Helmet
- Golden Chestplate
- Golden Leggings
- Golden Boots
- Chainmail Helmet
- Chainmail Chestplate
- Chainmail Leggings
- Chainmail Boots
- Iron Helmet
- Iron Chestplate
- Iron Leggings
- Iron Boots
- Diamond Helmet
- Diamond Chestplate
- Diamond Leggings
- Diamond Boots
- Netherite Helmet
- Netherite Chestplate
- Netherite Leggings
- Netherite Boots
